mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.object_type AS "objectType", a.object_id AS "objectId", a.action, a.actor_id AS "actorId", COALESCE(account.name, a.actor_name) AS "actorName", a.comment, a.extra, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt" FROM operation_log a LEFT JOIN sys_account account ON account.id = a.actor_id WHERE a.object_type = #{objectType} AND a.object_id = #{objectId} ORDER BY a.created_at ASC, a.id ASC
